ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-15-298529 Estate of Thomas F. Dallman and PES-17-301177 Estate of Peter R. Dallman.

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Ann Dallman.

Ms. Stoneman provided family history and stated that if the petition for spousal property is granted, she can close out the estate. Ms. Stoneman also stated that if it is not granted, she will proceed with probate. The Petition for First and Final Report of Executor, etc. and the Petition for Spousal Property are taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
